reviews.comment:
1 solo surtidor un sábado a la noche. Filas de muchos autos esperando y varios se fueron. Los baños sucios y sin papel. Ypf full cerrado. El lugar muy concurrido. Siendo la central deberia estar trabajando a full para brindar el mejor servicio a sus socios.

(Translated by Google)
Only one pump open on a Saturday night. Long lines of cars waiting, and several left. The restrooms were dirty and out of toilet paper. The YPF station was completely closed. The place was very busy. As the main station, it should be working at full capacity to provide the best service to its members.

reviewReply.comment: Le pedimos disculpas solucionaremos los inconvenientes saludos

reviews.comment:
Como siempre parece una repartición pública. Larga cola y espera para cargar combustible y lentitud y desgano de los empleados. Queda el consuelo de que supuestamente deben tener los tanques de combustible en buen estado.

(Translated by Google)
As always, it feels like a government office. Long lines and waits to fill up, and the employees are slow and unenthusiastic. The only consolation is that they're supposedly supposed to have their fuel tanks in good condition.

reviewReply.comment: Mil disculpas por su interpretación tratamos de mejorar la atención permanentemente saludos
